articles.title: Lionel Messi's FIFA World Cup Destiny: A Record-Breaking Goal Leaves the Football World in Awe
articles.description: Lionel Messi became the all-time leading FIFA World Cup goalscorer, surpassing Miroslav Klose. He scored his 17th goal against Austria at the 2026 World Cup after missing a penalty, then added another to reach 18, cementing his legacy.

articles.title: Giovanni Malago elected FIGC president, tasked with reviving Italian football
articles.description: The 67-year-old saw off, as widely expected, his only challenger for the position, former football chief Giancarlo Abete, taking 68.58 per cent of the votes during an extraordinary general meeting held at the FIGC’s headquarters in Rome.

articles.title: Halo: Campaign Evolved Won't Require PS Plus for Local Split Screen Co-Op on PS5, Halo Studios Clarifies
articles.description: PS5 users won't need a PS Plus subscription to play Halo: Campaign Evolved split screen co-op, Halo Studios has clarified. However, all users will need a Microsoft account and an Xbox Gamertag to access the game. Halo: Campaign Evolved will launch on July 28 on PC, PS5, and Xbox Series S/X.

articles.description: Rohan Bopanna has backed defending champion Jannik Sinner and Elena Rybakina to win the Wimbledon 2026 singles titles. The Indian doubles veteran also reflected on his lifelong love for Wimbledon, calling it a dream tournament. With Novak Djokovic chasing a 25th Grand Slam and Iga Swiatek aiming for a successful title defence, Bopanna expects another highly competitive edition.

articles.title: ICC unveils post-pregnancy return-to-play guidelines for women cricketers
articles.description: The ICC has launched comprehensive guidelines to help female cricketers return to the sport post-pregnancy, recognizing the growing trend of mothers in elite cricket. This initiative, featuring a six-stage "6 Rs" model, aims to support players, coaches, and medical teams by offering practical advice on physical and mental recovery, alongside flexible arrangements. The move is lauded as a significant step for women's cricket, ensuring motherhood doesn't end a career.

articles.title: 'Speed up your calculation': D Gukesh advised ahead of World Chess Championship match against Javokhir Sindarov
articles.description: Ahead of his world title defence against Javokhir Sindarov, D Gukesh has been advised by Grandmaster Krishnan Sasikiran to improve his speed, technique and handling of time pressure. Sasikiran warned that Sindarov is highly prepared and fast-paced, but said Gukesh's previous world championship experience could prove crucial in what promises to be a tough contest.

articles.title: WC: Messi's Argentina, Mbappe's France in focus as final dash for knockouts begins
articles.description: The FIFA World Cup 2026 is entering a thrilling group stage finale with 42 nations vying for 29 spots in the Round of 32. Only USA, Mexico, and Germany have secured early qualification, while Haiti, Turkiye, and Tunisia are out. Powerhouses like Argentina, France, England, and Portugal are still fighting for advancement. The week promises intense competition and simultaneous matches as the knockout picture takes shape.

articles.title: Netherlands crush Sweden 5-1 to reignite FIFA World Cup title hopes
articles.description: In a remarkable display, the Netherlands cruised to a 5-1 victory over Sweden, overcoming their World Cup disappointments. Manager Ronald Koeman's strategic choice to start Brian Brobbey upfront proved effective, reflecting their famed 'Total Football' style. This exhilarating performance has sparked renewed hope among fans and analysts alike, with some daringly forecasting a World Cup victory that parallels recent triumphs in cricket.
